description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Push Container to Heroku that triggers on push to the main branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, then login to Heroku using the HEROKU_API_KEY from secrets, set the Heroku stack to heroku-22 for the djangosnippets app, login to the Heroku container registry, build and push the container to the djangosnippets app, and finally release the new container.
